name: Volume Optimizer
description: An engineering analytics solution designed to perform accurate cut-and-fill volume calculations for construction and infrastructure planning. It helps optimize earthwork operations, estimate project costs, and improve efficiency in terrain-based development projects.

name: Terrain Analysis
description: A geospatial analysis tool that enables users to generate, visualize, and analyze 3D terrain models. It supports advanced terrain evaluation workflows such as elevation profiling, slope analysis, and surface visualization.

name: .GeoLedger
description: A spatial data management platform designed to maintain and track GIS dataset versions using branch versioning workflows. It enables collaborative editing, version control, and reliable management of enterprise geospatial data.

name: GeoThree
description: A lightweight geospatial visualization application that allows users to interact with spatial data using modern web-based 3D rendering libraries, enabling basic geospatial operations without requiring traditional GIS software.
